name: EPG Enricher
description: Enriches EPG programme data with TMDB artwork (posters, backdrops), genres and descriptions. Detects gaps in programme schedules and fills them with placeholder entries.

settings.label: Enrich programmes with TMDB data
settings.helper_text: Fetch posters, backdrops, genres and descriptions from TMDB for programmes that are missing artwork.

settings.label: Fill EPG gaps with placeholders
settings.helper_text: Insert placeholder programme entries into gaps longer than the configured minimum duration.

settings.label: Minimum gap duration (minutes)
settings.helper_text: Gaps shorter than this are ignored. Only applies when gap filling is enabled.

settings.label: Gap placeholder title
settings.helper_text: Title shown for placeholder entries inserted into gaps.

settings.label: Overwrite existing artwork
settings.helper_text: Replace existing poster/backdrop URLs even if the programme already has artwork.

settings.label: Enrich missing categories/genres
settings.helper_text: Fill in missing genre/category from TMDB when the programme has none.

settings.label: Enrich missing descriptions
settings.helper_text: Fill in missing programme descriptions from TMDB.

settings.label: Auto-run after EPG cache generation
settings.helper_text: Automatically enrich EPG data whenever the cache is rebuilt.
